tasks.name: Technical Discovery
tasks.description: Assessing the current technology landscape, existing systems, and infrastructure capabilities.

tasks.name: Feasibility Analysis
tasks.description: Evaluating technical viability of proposed business requirements and identifying constraints.

tasks.name: Technology Selection
tasks.description: Recommending technology stacks, platforms, and frameworks aligned with project goals.

tasks.name: Risk Identification
tasks.description: Identifying technical risks, dependencies, and potential integration challenges early.

tasks.name: Cost Estimation Support
tasks.description: Providing rough-order-of-magnitude estimates for infrastructure, licensing, and development effort.

tasks.name: Stakeholder Alignment
tasks.description: Running architecture workshops to align business, product, security, and ops stakeholders on scope, risks, and decision criteria.

tasks.name: Compliance & Privacy Scan
tasks.description: Highlighting regulatory or policy constraints (PII/PHI, data residency, industry standards) that shape solution boundaries.

tasks.name: Third-Party/Vendor Strategy
tasks.description: Assessing SaaS/Cloud vendors, integration fit, contractual constraints, and exit/mitigation options.

tasks.name: Architecture Design
tasks.description: Creating high-level and detailed architecture diagrams (C4, UML, sequence diagrams).

tasks.name: Non-Functional Requirements (NFRs)
tasks.description: Defining performance, scalability, security, availability, and maintainability targets.

tasks.name: Integration Design
tasks.description: Mapping out system integrations, API contracts, data flows, and third-party dependencies.

tasks.name: Data Architecture
tasks.description: Designing data models, storage strategies, and data migration plans.

tasks.name: Technical Standards
tasks.description: Establishing coding standards, design patterns, and architectural guidelines for the team.

tasks.name: Data Privacy & Governance
tasks.description: Defining data classification, retention, residency, and access-control models across domains.

tasks.name: DR/BCP Architecture
tasks.description: Designing disaster recovery and business continuity posture (RPO/RTO targets, failover topology).

tasks.name: Vendor & Third-Party Controls
tasks.description: Specifying integration safeguards, SLAs, and operational models for external services and suppliers.

tasks.name: Requirements Traceability & Compliance Mapping
tasks.description: Maintaining bidirectional traceability from business/NFR items to design, tests, and runbooks, including privacy and regulatory clauses.

tasks.name: Technical Guidance
tasks.description: Providing hands-on support to developers on architectural decisions and design patterns.

tasks.name: Code & Design Reviews
tasks.description: Reviewing critical code, pull requests, and component designs for architectural compliance.

tasks.name: Spike & PoC Leadership
tasks.description: Leading technical spikes and proof-of-concepts to de-risk uncertain areas.

tasks.name: Technical Debt Management
tasks.description: Tracking and prioritizing technical debt; proposing remediation strategies.

tasks.name: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)
tasks.description: Documenting key technical decisions, rationale, and trade-offs for future reference.

tasks.name: IaC & Environment Baseline
tasks.description: Establishing reproducible environments (IaC, configuration management) and enforcing drift controls across dev/test/stage/prod.

tasks.name: Performance & Load Testing
tasks.description: Defining test scenarios and benchmarks for NFR validation (latency, throughput, concurrency).

tasks.name: Security Review
tasks.description: Conducting threat modeling, vulnerability assessments, and ensuring compliance with security policies.

tasks.name: Infrastructure Validation
tasks.description: Verifying that deployment environments match the designed architecture specifications.

tasks.name: Integration Testing Support
tasks.description: Ensuring end-to-end integration points function correctly across system boundaries.

tasks.name: Compliance Validation
tasks.description: Verifying regulatory, privacy, and policy requirements through targeted test cases and evidence collection.

tasks.name: Deployment Architecture
tasks.description: Designing CI/CD pipelines, blue-green/canary deployment strategies, and rollback mechanisms.

tasks.name: Monitoring & Observability
tasks.description: Setting up logging, metrics, alerting, and distributed tracing for production systems.

tasks.name: Capacity Planning
tasks.description: Analyzing production data to forecast scaling needs and optimize resource utilization.

tasks.name: Post-Mortem Analysis
tasks.description: Leading technical root-cause analysis for production incidents and outages.

tasks.name: Architecture Evolution
tasks.description: Refining the architecture based on real-world performance data and emerging requirements.

tasks.name: Runbooks & Knowledge Transfer
tasks.description: Delivering operational runbooks, onboarding material, and handover sessions for support/ops teams.

tasks.name: FinOps & Cost Guardrails
tasks.description: Establishing cost baselines, alerts, and optimization playbooks tied to usage trends.

tasks.name: Resilience/Chaos Testing
tasks.description: Designing and running chaos or game-day exercises to validate failure modes and recovery paths.

tasks.name: Architecture Governance & Change Control
tasks.description: Setting review cadences, change-control workflows, and ADR audits to keep the architecture baseline governed and current.
